content.en:
After a period of time, Ye Tian came out of that area boundary, went to the Youhe District boundary, and then returned to the primeval plain region boundary from the Dao Gate imprint point of the Youhe District boundary.

After coming back, Ye Tian inquired, and only then did he know that several more Dao Ancestors had fallen on the way back, and they were surrounded and killed by a large number of primordial ancients.

I have to say that their luck is really bad.

Of course, it is also a lack of strength.

If the strength is strong, such as Ye Tian, he doesn't care about the siege and killing of those primordial ancients.

......

"It's a big harvest this time!"

Ye Tian took out a drop of black liquid, a total of nearly a thousand drops.

If in the past, where could you get so much black liquid, you would also be able to kill so many Yuan Shen Drums, so as to obtain so much black liquid.

"Absorbing and refining so much black liquid, there should be hope that my Endless Yuan Dao prototype will skyrocket, and there is even hope that I can comprehend the true Endless Yuan Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian kept refining the black liquid, and then comprehended the Endless Yuan Dao.

With the continuous consumption of black liquor, Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao Prototype realm became higher and higher, and he was getting closer and closer to comprehending the true Endless Yuan Dao.

Of course.

Ye Tian's other copied bodies were also rapidly refining resources, improving their cultivation, comprehending the Endless Yuan Dao and improving their cultivation without delay.

Before you know it, tens of millions of years have passed.

"The black liquor is consumed, and it is completely gone, although it can be copied, but the copied black liquor cannot be refined and used, so it is meaningless. "

With so much black liquor consumed, Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao rudimentary form had probably increased to more than seventy percent, which showed how difficult it was to comprehend the true Ninefold Yuan Dao!

"Comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, the Dao Ancestor who walked the Ninefold Yuan Dao, if he wants to comprehend the real Ninefold Yuan Dao, it is too difficult, no wonder a strong person like the Taigu Dao Ancestor left this area boundary in the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and left through the Black Mountain, it is estimated that he also feels that it is too difficult to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao and improve his cultivation, and it takes too long to take too many years, so he chose to leave!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Among these tens of thousands of realms, there are not many Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and there is more or less one in the history of many realms.

There were even two people born in the primeval realm, so it was not too rare to comprehend three hundred and sixty-five extreme demons.

However, in this era, there are only two ancestors who have comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes.

One was Ye Tian, the other was his disciple Han Xuan, and the other realms had not comprehended the original ancestor of the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes at all.

The original ancestors who had comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes had all left here and entered the other side of Black Mountain.

"Maybe in the future, I will choose to leave!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Another period of time passed, Ye Tian exhausted his resources, and his cultivation was finally promoted to the realm of the late stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

At this time, his combat power had been raised to a very powerful level, definitely no less than those powerful half-step sevenfold ancestors.

Silent Black Sea.

Ye Tian came here, and he was going to test his strength with those primordial antiquities.

Soon, a primordial antiquity similar to a tree branch appeared, and Ye Tian pointed at it casually and killed it directly.

With the passage of time, the proto-hominins appeared.

Comparable to the primordial ancients of the middle stage of the sixfold period, Ye Tian killed in one move!

Comparable to the primordial ancients of the Sixfold Late Primordial Ancestor, Ye Tian is also a one-trick kill!

Gradually, the primordial ancients comparable to the sixfold peak ancestor appeared, and Ye Tian spent dozens of moves, smashing the opponent's body again and again, and finally killed him as well.

Ultimately.

A primordial ancient man comparable to a half-step sevenfold ancestor appeared, and in the past, he couldn't beat such a primordial ancient.

But now, Ye Tian easily crushed it.

However, the primordial ancients were very difficult to kill, and the recovery power was too terrifying, and it took Ye Tian a long time to shatter the other party's body.

But this is still a lot less than killing the other party.

"Can't be killed!"

Ye Tian shook his head and directly chose to give up fighting with this primordial ancient.

So, he returned directly to the boundaries of the Archean Plains.

In the following years, Ye Tian entered the Silent Black Sea every once in a while, killed some Primordial Ancients, and collected some Primordial Ancient Beads.

The Primordial Ancient Bead is a good thing, and there are enough Primordial Ancient Beads to support the Black Mountain that shuttles through the Silent Black Sea, otherwise a Dao Ancestor, who has been shuttling in the Silent Black Sea for so long, even if he is strong, once he encounters a large number of Primordial Ancient Beings besieged, he will be consumed to death.

And if there are enough Primordial Ancient Beads, they can continue to recover, and even their recovery ability will surpass that of the Primordial Ancients, then it will be very difficult to be killed.

The Dao Ancestors in this area, if they wanted to leave here, would find a way to collect enough Primordial Ancient Beads.

Ye Tian will not leave for the time being, but he will also collect enough Primordial Ancient Beads to prepare in advance.

After all, if there were no Primordial Ancients in this area one day, there would be no way to collect Primordial Beads.

The years passed, and millions of years of the Primordial Era passed.

this day.

The Xuanqing Dao Ancestor of the Tongtian Origin Domain came to find Ye Tian.

Ye Tian and Xuanqing Dao Ancestor were not familiar with each other, but they had encountered each other in the Shattered Void Giant City and the Ancient Nest of the Yuan Shen Drum before, but they did not have any communication.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, can there be few?"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor appeared outside Ye Tian's dojo and said.

Ye Tian was not surprised that his dojo was discovered by Xuanqing Dao Ancestor.

This kind of dojo may be difficult to find for the Fivefold Ancestor, but for the powerful Sixfold Ancestor, it can be found with a little time.

And for the half-step sevenfold ancestor, it can be discovered in an instant.

"Please!"

Ye Tian invited Xuanqing Dao Ancestor into his dojo.

Soon, Xuanqing Daozu turned to the main topic.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, I am here to invite you to Intercept Black Mountain on behalf of Qingfeng Dao Ancestor!"

Xuanqing Daozu said.

"Is it the Black Mountain that cuts off the Black Sea?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Xuanqing Dao Ancestor nodded, "It's that Black Mountain, it's called Truncated Black Mountain, but generally Dao Ancestors don't care about its real name." Truncating Montenegro seems to be a continuous mountain range, directly cutting off this piece of time and space, but in fact it is like an uncrossable world, and it is not as small as we see. It is very difficult to go through the Silent Black Mountain, and a single half-step sevenfold ancestor does not have absolute certainty to cross the past. There was more than one half-step sevenfold ancestor who died there, and as a result, many half-step sevenfold ancestors did not dare to pass through. This time, Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and the other six Dao Ancestors were ready to cross the Truncated Black Mountain together, and the seven of them were still not absolutely sure, so they also invited some half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestors to escort them through the most dangerous section, even if the task was completed. After that, you don't need to care. "

"So, Qingfeng Daozu invited me to help?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Yes!" Xuanqing Dao Ancestor said again: "Of course, it is impossible to help in vain, such a dangerous thing, even life-threatening, no half-step Sevenfold Ancestor is willing to help in vain, even if it is me, I will ask for benefits." "

"What kind of reward did Qingfeng Dao Ancestor give? If the reward is okay, I can help. "

Ye Tian said.
